---
title: "roman_l2_job"
subtitle: "Roman WFI L2 → L3 simulation pipeline + photometry recovery test"
author: "Nikhil Padmanabhan"
date: last-modified
---

## What this is

`roman_l2_job` is a self-contained pipeline that simulates Roman WFI Level-2
calibrated images over a chosen footprint, builds Level-3 skycell coadds and
source catalogs from them, and measures how faithfully the recovered catalog
reproduces the input catalog — a **photometry recovery test**. It was built
to support simulated grism observations of a Wide-Field2 sub-region near
(RA=10°, Dec=0°), but generalizes to any footprint and any input source
catalog.

Code, configs, and this report all live in the
[roman_l2_job](https://github.com/roman-grs-pit/roman_l2_job) GitHub repo.

## How this report is organized

- [**Pipeline**](pipeline.qmd) — what the pipeline does, how to install it,
  what each stage reads and writes, and the deliberate deviations from stock
  upstream (vendored `make_stack.py`, per-line deterministic seeds, CRDS
  hydration). Common to every campaign.
- **Full run** — the first real campaign on `configs/full.yaml`, 324 sims
  across 6 visits of the (RA=10°, Dec=0°) field.
    - [Design](full/design.qmd) — pointings, parameters, measured zodi.
    - [Results](full/results.qmd) — per-skycell completeness, flux residual,
      astrometric residual, depth distribution.
    - [Discussion](full/discussion.qmd) — what the numbers mean for grism
      support, caveats on Kron bias, footprint non-uniformity.

Future campaigns (e.g. a lower-zodi comparison run) will sit as siblings of
"Full run" in the sidebar.

## Headline numbers from the full run

::: {.callout-note}
6 visits × 3 dithers × 18 SCAs = **324 F158 sims**,
**320 skycell coadds + catalogs**, ~15 h end-to-end on m5a.2xlarge at 4-way.

- **Median 50%-completeness (AB):** 23.95 over all skycells, 24.05 in the
  deep-pixel subset, peaks at **24.50** in the deepest skycells.
- **Kron flux residual:** **+0.17 mag** (recovered − input), flat across
  depth — it's a Kron-photometry property on extended sources, not a
  pipeline calibration issue.
- **Astrometric residual:** **~0.017″**, sub-coadd-pixel across every
  skycell.
- **Depth structure:** only even integers appear in per-pixel depth
  (2, 4, 6, 8); pass 15 and pass 16 re-observe identical pointings, so sum
  is always 2× an integer.
- **Field geometry:** only ~25% of skycells within 0.5° of the field
  center hit the intended design depth; the 18 pointings form three
  visit-cluster patches with shallow gaps between.
- **Zodiacal background:** **1.28 e⁻/pix/s** (sigma-clipped), ~3.4× the
  polar-minimum reference — expected for a field essentially on the
  ecliptic observed at high (~128°) elongation.
:::
